There are many unusualhotels aroundthe world.In Greenland,there is a hotelmadeoutof ice, open between DecemberandApril every year.In Turkey,thereis a cavehotel withatelevision,furniture,and a bathroomineachroom.AndinBolivia,thereistheSaltPalace Hotel.
Thousandsofyearsago,theareaaroundtheSaltPalaceHotelwasalargelake.Butovertime,allthe waiter disappeared. Today, the area has only two small lakes and two salt deserts.

Thelargerofthetwodeserts,theUyunisaltdeser,is12,000squarekilometres.Duringthedayhe desertisbrightwhitebecauseofthesalt.TherearenoroadsacrosstheUyunideser,solocalpeoplemust show guests the way to the hotel.

In theearly199Os,a man named JuanQuesadabuiltthehotel.Hecutbigblocks of saltfromthe desertand usedtheblockstobuildit.Everythinginthehotelismadeoutofsalt:thewalls,theroof(屋顶),thetables,the chairs, the beds, and the hotel's bar.
